reviews.reason: The paper's standing-wave equation i psi_t = (-Delta)^s psi + V psi - g(|psi|^2) psi is a nonlinear (fractional) Schrodinger equation, exactly the GP/NLS structure with a fractional-Laplacian twist.

The core Chern-Simons-Schrodinger equation iD_0 psi + (D_1D_1+D_2D_2)psi + g(|psi|^2)psi = 0 is a nonlinear Schrodinger equation gauge-coupled to a Chern-Simons field, instantiating the GP/NLS template.
The pricing policy is a textbook Q-learning value-iteration update Q <- Q + alpha(r + gamma max Q' - Q) with discounted return, a direct Bellman instantiation.
The environment is a genuine station-selection game with utility-maximizing agents whose outcome is a Nash-stable partition, a real best-response equilibrium concept and the Bertrand baseline.
The core dynamics dX = b_1 dt + sqrt(eps) sigma_1 dW + eps integral g dN is an Ito diffusion SDE, with mean-field, jump, and two-timescale twists over the canonical Langevin form.
The Dyson Brownian motion eigenvalue equations dlambda = drift dt + 2 sqrt(gamma) lambda dB are coupled Ito/Langevin SDEs, canonical for this structure.
The paper explicitly writes the forward equation d_t P = (Gamma/2) d_omega[(d_omega + 2V')P] for the eigenvalue distribution, a Fokker-Planck/Kolmogorov-forward equation.
Equilibrium continuation values obey recursive discounted V(r) = (1-delta)u + delta sum Psi V(r') relations with a max operator, a Bellman-style dynamic-programming recursion.
A multi-player delivery/routing game whose solution is each player's best response characterized by Kuhn-Tucker/KKT conditions on a simplex, i.e. a Nash equilibrium.
The two-sublattice ferrimagnet Hamiltonian H = -J sum sigma_i sigma_{i+1} - h mu sum sigma with sigma,b = +/-1 is exactly the Ising pairwise-coupling energy with an external field.

The Bass adoption model is a scalar logistic/Bass equation with at most SI-type contagion and no recovery compartment or S->I->R structure, so the defining SIR features are absent and it double-counts the logistic assignment.
The mean-field Bass diffusion limit is the sigmoidal self-limiting adoption curve explicitly aliased as logistic_growth (Bass diffusion of innovations).
The core is an explicit multi-species birth-death master equation dP_n/dt = sum(W in - W out) with gain-loss transition rates.
The paper states a two-state (polarized/milling) Markov process with exponential holding times describes the transition, a genuine two-state Markov chain.
The asset model is a regime-switching log-asset jump diffusion expressed as standard jump diffusions for option pricing, a GBM-family (Black-Scholes asset) structure.
